subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-07-09 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The quintessence of the matter is that under the protection of the Blessed Perfection we have spent our days in this Most Great Prison.
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
